feedback: Clean, specific, earned. The 'I build with Bun. I publish packages.' opener establishes personal stake without credential-dumping. 'Default behavior, not an exploit.' is a genuine take that will prompt response. 'Wondering how many others, too.' is natural community-invite without farming. Stops exactly when the thought is done.

dimension_notes.voice: pass — 3 first-person refs, 1 fragment ('Default behavior, not an exploit.'), good burstiness short-to-medium-to-short, zero banned words or phrases
dimension_notes.framing: pass — single event reaction (Claude Code leak), personal stake clear, no do_not_include bleed, reads like a community member not a brand account
dimension_notes.platform: pass — 287 chars (under 300), single post, technical specificity (.npmignore, Bun, package publishing), source link present, mindpattern.ai present
dimension_notes.epistemic: pass — 'Wondering how many others, too' is honest uncertainty without generic hedging
dimension_notes.structure: pass — short/short/medium/short/short/fragment rhythm, no neat bow, stops cold
dimension_notes.framework: pass — fact ('Bug was open 20 days') precedes take ('Default behavior, not an exploit'), source link present, no uncited claims
